prompt: Ultra-realistic portrait of a beautiful young woman with long straight black hair and delicate round glasses, sitting on the floor beside tall bookshelves in a cozy bookstore or library. She wears an elegant oversized white button-up shirt over a white camisole and matching white pants, holding an open book in her hands. Thoughtful expression, looking upward as if lost in deep thought, warm ambient lighting, golden cinematic tones, shelves filled with books in the background, intellectual and peaceful atmosphere, soft bokeh, shallow depth of field, natural makeup, refined features, lifestyle photography, academic aesthetic, cozy reading corner, professional editorial portrait, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ultra-detailed, realistic skin texture, HDR, 8K quality.

promptZh: 超写实人像，主角是一位美丽的 年轻女性，留着黑色长直发，戴着精致的圆框眼镜，坐在 温馨书店或图书馆 的高大书架旁。她身穿优雅的白色大码衬衫，内搭白色吊带背心，下身穿着配套的白色长裤，手中拿着一本打开的书。神情若有所思，抬头仰望，仿佛陷入了深思。温暖的环境光，金色的电影质感色调，背景是摆满书籍的书架，充满书卷气与宁静的氛围，柔和的焦外成像，浅景深，自然妆容，五官精致，生活方式摄影，学术审美，温馨阅读角，专业编辑级人像，85mm 镜头，f/1.8，超细节，真实的皮肤纹理，HDR，8K 画质。
